programmes.show_description: Paul, Dawn And Samantha. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the murder of three young children in 1973. Plus, a mother fights to change the law after her son is killed. S5, Ep5
The Sticky Tape Killer. When a woman's badly decomposed body is discovered in a suitcase in a small North Yorkshire village, detectives must figure out who she is and who killed her. S1, Ep7
The Confession. When a young mum goes missing in Ellesmere Port, the whole community searches for her. After a tip, Police locate the charred suitcase that holds her remains. S1, Ep8
Shattered Dreams. Reluctant witnesses force police to rely on CCTV after the murder of a father in a Baltimore, Maryland, in his own home. S10, Ep3
The Trophy Collector. In Baltimore, police turn to CCTV to hunt for a budding serial killer after two women are strangled to death in one week. S10, Ep4

In the Line of Fire. Investigates the tragic cases of innocent people ruthlessly killed by bombers, snipers and spree killers. S5, Ep4
For the Love of Money. The naked body of a Swedish man is found, a father and son are accused of killing a woman and a police officer impostor disposes of her love rival. S5, Ep5
Predator. When a little girl is abducted the FBI race to locate their prime suspect - a drifter on parole for kidnapping children - but will they find him before it's too late? S3, Ep6
The Price of Greed. Follows the FBI investigation into a robbery in which masked gunmen tied up employees at an armoured truck depot and left with $18.9 million. S5, Ep1
Nicola Fellows & Karen Hadaway. The murder of two children sparks a manhunt that spans three decades. Plus, the National Crime Agency attempts to thwart a gun smuggling operation. S5, Ep7
Mother Of All Lies. In 2015, detective Scott Sanderson uncovered a harrowing case involving a missing mother and her baby. The disturbing truth shatters everyone involved. S2, Ep3
The End Of Innocence. A young woman on the brink of starting her dream job disappears, and it's down to forensic officers to gather the clues that may lead to her whereabouts. S1, Ep8
The Vanishing Nurse. Nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. Police discover CCTV footage of her car driving around a parking lot, but who is the driver? S2, Ep3
Roger Dean set fire to a nursing home, murdering 11 people. Experts analyse the actions and motive of this twisted serial killer. S2, Ep6
I Had No Choice. For years, Bill, Stephanie, and their three kids hide their torment while struggling to keep up appearances. But in 2011, the façade shatters for good. S8, Ep2
Rescue Me. In Genoa, Ohio, John Eichner, his wife and kids look like a happy bunch, but behind closed doors a disturbing pattern of torment and gaslighting plays out for years. S8, Ep3
Kind Of A Vicious Person. An elderly Arizona couple's murder spurs a statewide hunt for the killer. The investigation culminates in an unexpected arrest. S4, Ep10
Joanna Yeates. British criminal barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of 25-year-old Joanna Yeates, who was found strangled to death on Christmas Day in 2010. S1, Ep3
Watching Dru. Student Dru Sjodin suddenly vanishes after her shift at Victoria's Secret. CCTV footage shows Dru's last movements revealing the chilling reason for her disappearance. S2, Ep5
Love, Lies, And Lust. In 2018, police search a backyard in Florida for a body after a once-idyllic marriage sours and turns vengeful, filled with lies and affairs. S9, Ep7
She Had No Name. A young woman vanishes into a patrol car. For 35 years, she's a Jane Doe, until hypnosis reveals a clue that unmasks a predator hiding in plain sight. S1, Ep4
Nicola Fellows & Karen Hadaway. The murder of two children sparks a manhunt that spans three decades. Plus, the National Crime Agency attempts to thwart a gun smuggling operation. S5, Ep7
The Glasgow Poisoning. When police discover a young man's body in a Glasgow bedsit, their investigation reveals he died by arsenic poisoning. Was it murder or suicide? S1, Ep1
The Whitechapel Tragedy. When a woman's head is found in a package, police must identity and the story of her life. The case reveals bigamy, betrayal and brutal murder. S1, Ep2
Real-life cases reveal how video evidence has been used to solve a murder. Police reveal how CCTV footage has unlocked the answer to baffling cases. S10, Ep5
The Painted Truck. Detectives turn to CCTV footage after the shooting of an elderly man in Texas. An old pickup truck could hold the key to identifying the man's killer. S10, Ep6

Invisible Death. Discover how toxicologists look for clues in blood and tissue to bring murders to light, including the case of a wife poisoned by cyanide. S5, Ep7
Dead in the Water. Discover how scientists can search beneath water for proof of homicide, with cases including a woman found floating in a pond tied to a car jack. S5, Ep12
Caught in the Act. Follows FBI investigations into similar armed robberies across the US in which several people were killed by two male suspects. S5, Ep2
Home Invaders. A convicted bank robber and his partner in crime escape on their way to court and go on to make the biggest bank robbery in Wisconsin history. S5, Ep5
Michael Lane. Shana Grice was murdered after being stalked by her ex-boyfriend, Michael Lane. He denied involvement, but experts examine police videos to determine the truth. S3, Ep6
Invisible Death. Discover how toxicologists look for clues in blood and tissue to bring murders to light, including the case of a wife poisoned by cyanide. S5, Ep7
Dead in the Water. Discover how scientists can search beneath water for proof of homicide, with cases including a woman found floating in a pond tied to a car jack. S5, Ep12
Stolen Identity. A woman, Betty, identifies a dead body as her missing sister Annie - but Annie is still alive. A look at murderers who kill to acquire a new identity. S6, Ep4
Prescription For Murder. Wisconsin police are shocked to find an elderly couple brutally murdered in their home. When family start receiving death threats, will murder strike again? S3, Ep13
Murder By The Book. A couple is shot in their own home but husband Dan Montecalvo survives. The investigation reveals a scheming killer who almost got away with the perfect murder. S3, Ep11
No Happy Ending. 44-year-old masseuse Larissa Macriello vanishes from her Miami apartment, and police discover a dangerous edge to her carefree lifestyle - but what is the real story? S3, Ep7
Millionaire Murder. In 1994, a 55-year-old businessman is found shot in his kitchen. The police suspect his disabled son, but would he have had the capability to carry out a murder? S1, Ep3
Disappearing Act. Real estate developer Jana Koklich vanishes and police suspect her job led her into danger, until a local pastor comes forward with a shocking confession. S3, Ep12
Homicide Hotel. A maid finds a woman dead in Room 305 of an Oregon hotel. Her grieving husband reveals an open relationship, but was an affair to blame? S2, Ep9
Protecting Holly. A plot to kidnap TV presenter Holly Willoughby is discovered when an undercover cop in the US spots something suspicious in an online chat room. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: A Mother's Manipulation. When investigators suspect a mother's involvement in the death of her two children, Ranger Jim Holland comes in to unearth the truth. S1, Ep8
